top_findings: 6 of 11 sections are in draft status — only 28 of 52 articles (53.8%) produce pages in production
Homepage title is generic 'Home | FacialCupping.com' — wasted keyword opportunity
No BreadcrumbList JSON-LD on any page — missing rich snippet opportunity across entire site
No images in any published article — massive missed opportunity for engagement and image search
Safety and Tools sections (11 articles combined) are in draft — high-value content hidden
quick_wins: Publish Safety section — unlock 7 articles with one status change
Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to Breadcrumb.astro component
Fix og:image to use absolute URLs in BaseLayout.astro
Add twitter:image meta tag alongside existing Twitter card markup
Rewrite homepage title from 'Home' to keyword-targeted title
Add publication dates to ArticleCard component
Change MobileMenu from client:load to client:idle

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Canonical URLs correctly set dynamically
Meta robots defaults to index, follow
Static site generation — excellent crawlability
@astrojs/sitemap integration auto-discovers pages
robots.txt allows all with correct sitemap reference
Clean URL structure across all pages
Draft control system prevents draft/dev pages from building

findings.title: 6 of 11 sections are draft — only 5 sections produce pages
findings.description: Only learn, benefits, how-to, research, about are published. Safety (7), Tools (4), Oils (2), Comparisons (3), Brands (4), GlowCup (5) are invisible to search engines. The site appears 55% smaller than its content library suggests.
findings.recommendation: Publish Safety section first (change sections/safety.md status to 'published'), then Tools, and remaining sections systematically

findings.title: Safety section is draft despite 7 articles
findings.description: sections/safety.md has status: 'draft'. This section has high-value YMYL keywords (side effects, contraindications, 'does it work').
findings.recommendation: Change sections/safety.md status to 'published'. Verify all 7 article frontmatter statuses are also 'published'.

findings.title: Safety section is draft despite 7 articles
findings.description: sections/safety.md has status: 'draft'. Safety content is critical for YMYL trust signals including FAQ, side effects, contraindications, and 'does it work' queries.
findings.recommendation: Change sections/safety.md status to 'published' and verify article statuses.

findings.title: No custom 404 page
findings.description: No src/pages/404.astro found. Astro's default 404 page is minimal and not on-brand.
findings.recommendation: Create src/pages/404.astro with branded design and search/sitemap links.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Named professionals (Sarah Chen L.E., James Liu TCM) author key articles
All published articles have datePublished and dateUpdated (2026 dates)
Scientific references: PubMed, Cochrane Library, PLoS One citations
Dedicated editorial guidelines, review process, mission pages
Readable structure: short paragraphs, headings, tables, bullets, FAQs
Rich cross-linking between articles and sections
Documented correction policy with reader-report mechanism
AI-assisted content policy disclosed in editorial guidelines

findings.title: 34 high-quality articles hidden behind draft status
findings.description: 7 unpublished sections hide 34 articles with author names, dates, and references. These represent 65% of total content investment.
findings.recommendation: Systematically publish sections: Safety → Tools → Oils → Comparisons → Brands → GlowCup

findings.title: No author bio/credential page
findings.description: Sarah Chen and James Liu have no linked bio page. Google and AI crawlers look for entity authority.
findings.recommendation: Create /about/team or individual author pages with credentials and article links

findings.title: ArticleCard shows no publication date
findings.description: Listing pages show article cards without dates. Users and search engines can't assess freshness at a glance.
findings.recommendation: Pass datePublished through ArticleCard props and display on listing pages

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique title tags per page with site name suffix
Unique meta descriptions per page
H1 headings match page title; homepage H1 is excellent
Proper H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy
Semantic breadcrumb HTML with aria-label on every page
Clean hyphenated keyword-targeted URL slugs
Semantic HTML structure (article, nav, main, section)

findings.title: Homepage title is 'Home | FacialCupping.com'
findings.description: index.astro passes title='Home' to BaseLayout. This wastes the homepage's strongest SEO signal.
findings.recommendation: Change to: 'Facial Cupping: Complete Guide to Benefits, Techniques & Safety | FacialCupping.com'

findings.title: Homepage uses default fallback meta description
findings.description: No description prop is passed to BaseLayout in index.astro. The generic fallback is used.
findings.recommendation: Pass explicit description prop to BaseLayout on homepage

findings.title: Section listing page titles too generic
findings.description: /learn/ → 'Learn | FacialCupping.com' (28 chars). Bare section names waste keyword space.
findings.recommendation: Use computed titles: '{Section}: {Subtopics} | FacialCupping.com'

findings.title: og:image uses relative paths
findings.description: BaseLayout.astro:40 passes ogImage as relative path. Facebook/LinkedIn may fail to resolve.
findings.recommendation: Prepend Astro.site to ogImage URL: https://facialcupping.com/images/...png

findings.title: No twitter:image meta tag
findings.description: Twitter card has summary_large_image, title, description but no image. X/Twitter cards show no image.
findings.recommendation: Add ogImage && <meta name='twitter:image' content={...}> in BaseLayout

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: WebSite schema on all pages (name, url, description)
Dynamic Article schema on all article pages (headline, description, author, publisher, dates, image)
FAQPage schema with 15 Q&A items for FAQ articles
ContactPage schema for contact page
Author entity discrimination: Organization vs Person type
Publisher correctly set as Organization

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList JSON-LD anywhere on site
findings.description: Breadcrumb.astro renders semantic HTML but no structured data. BreadcrumbList is one of Google's most-used rich snippets. Missing on all 18+ pages.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to Breadcrumb.astro with dynamic itemListElement

findings.title: Listing pages have no CollectionPage schema
findings.description: Section listing pages use only generic WebSite schema. Google can't identify them as content hubs.
findings.recommendation: Add CollectionPage schema with mainEntity as ItemList to [section]/index.astro

findings.title: No HowTo schema on tutorial articles
findings.description: Step-by-step guides use generic Article schema. HowTo schema enables step-by-step rich results.
findings.recommendation: Add HowTo schema with step/tool/supply/totalTime properties to tutorial articles

findings.title: No SearchAction in WebSite schema
findings.description: Sitelinks search box rich result requires SearchAction in WebSite schema.
findings.recommendation: Add potentialAction with SearchAction to WebSite schema in BaseLayout

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Static site generation — zero server rendering cost
Minimal JS — only MobileMenu.tsx (<5KB gzipped). No React on article pages
Tailwind CSS v4 JIT-compiled — extremely small CSS
Self-hosted fonts via @fontsource/outfit — zero external font requests
Zero third-party scripts — no analytics, ads, or tracking
No images on article pages — zero image loading overhead

findings.title: PageHero uses CSS background-image without responsive variants
findings.description: 8 hero PNGs loaded via inline style. No responsive images, no srcset, no loading=lazy.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP with <picture> element and responsive srcset

findings.title: All hero images are PNG format
findings.description: PNG is lossless and larger than necessary. WebP/AVIF could reduce bytes by 60-80%.
findings.recommendation: Convert hero images to WebP with PNG fallback via <picture>

findings.title: MobileMenu uses client:load instead of client:idle
findings.description: client:load hydrates immediately. client:idle would defer until browser is idle.
findings.recommendation: Change client:load to client:idle in Nav.astro

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Clear heading structure for AI crawler parsing
Article and FAQPage schemas improve AI citability
Named professionals with credentials signal authority to AI
Scientific citations from PubMed and peer-reviewed journals
FAQ format is highly citeable by AI assistants
Clear topical clusters from rich internal linking
Comprehensive editorial transparency policies

findings.title: No llms.txt at site root
findings.description: AI crawlers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude have no guidance on which pages to prioritize or cite.
findings.recommendation: Create /public/llms.txt with prioritized page list and summaries

findings.title: No AI-crawler-specific directives in robots.txt
findings.description: GPTBot, Claude-Web, CCBot, PerplexityBot get same treatment as all crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit User-agent + Allow directives for major AI crawlers

findings.title: No author credential page for entity signals
findings.description: AI models evaluate entity authority. No linked bio page for named authors.
findings.recommendation: Create author bio page with credentials, license numbers, and article archive

categories.name: Images
what_works: Section listing pages have branded hero background images
OG image mapping exists for social sharing in article pages
Decorative hero images correctly use CSS background-image

findings.title: Zero images in any published article
findings.description: Not a single image across 18 published articles. For a skincare/wellness site, before/after photos, technique diagrams, tool photos, and product images are expected and drive significant engagement and image search traffic.
findings.recommendation: Add 3-5 images per article: technique photos for how-to, before/after for benefits, tool photos for tools/brands

findings.title: All images are PNG format, no WebP/AVIF
findings.description: All hero and OG images use .png extension. WebP reduces file size by 60-80% with comparable quality.
findings.recommendation: Convert static PNGs to WebP with <picture> fallback for older browsers

findings.title: No image sitemap
findings.description: Images are not indexed for Google Image Search, missing a significant traffic channel.
findings.recommendation: Generate image sitemap once article images are added

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Publish Safety section — change sections/safety.md to published, verify article statuses
Rewrite homepage title from 'Home' to 'Facial Cupping: Complete Guide to Benefits, Techniques & Safety'
Add explicit description prop to homepage BaseLayout call
Fix og:image URLs to absolute (prepend https://facialcupping.com) in BaseLayout.astro
Add twitter:image meta tag in BaseLayout.astro
Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to Breadcrumb.astro component

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Publish Tools section (4 articles)
Create /public/llms.txt for AI crawler guidance
Update robots.txt with AI crawler directives
Add CollectionPage schema to [section]/index.astro
Enhance section listing titles with subtopics
Add publication dates to ArticleCard component
Pass OG image from homepage to BaseLayout
Change MobileMenu from client:load to client:idle

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Publish Oils, Comparisons, Brands, and GlowCup sections
Add 3-5 images to each published article
Create author bio page for Sarah Chen and James Liu
Convert hero PNGs to WebP with <picture> fallback
Add HowTo schema to tutorial articles
Expand 2-3 key articles to 2,000+ words
Create custom 404 page

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Set up Google Search Console + CrUX monitoring
Add image sitemap once article images exist
Add sequential article navigation (prev/next)
Plan pagination for growing sections
Add SearchAction to WebSite schema
Add Lighthouse CI to build pipeline
Build backlink/PR strategy for brand authority
